description: Allies within radius gain bonus armor and percent armor. Nearby Vanguards with this perk form a formation, amplifying each other's auras.
tooltipTemplate: Allies within {radius} units gain +{bonusArmor} armor and +{armorPercent%} percent armor. Each nearby Vanguard with this perk adds +{synergyRadiusBonus} radius, +{synergyArmorBonus} armor, and +{synergyArmorPercentBonus%} percent armor to your aura.
